revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23991619004|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:渭伊神社]] {{infobox religious building |name = Ii Shrine|native_name = 渭伊神社 |religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]|image = File:Ii-jinja, haiden-2.jpg |a11ress = [[静岡県]][[浜松市]][[浜名区]]引佐町[[井伊谷]]1150（字天白） |緯度度 = 34|緯度分 = 49|緯度秒 = 58.55 |経度度 = 137|経度分 = 39|経度秒 = 49.28 |ISO = JP-22 |祭神 = [[タマヨリビメ|玉依姫命]]
[[応神天皇|品陀和気命]]
[[神功皇后|息長足姫命]] |神体 = |社格 = {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}}（小）
旧[[郷社]] |創建 = 不詳 |例祭 = [[10月15日]] |本殿 = [[流造]] |別名 = 井伊谷八幡宮・八幡宮 |札所等 = |神事 = |ラベル位置 = top |地図 = |location = {{ill|Hamamatsu|qid=Q185125|1=Hamamatsu}} |coordinates = {{Coord|34.83294444444444|N|137.66369444444445|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} }} '''Ii Shrine''' (渭伊神社) == location == * A11ress: Inasa Town, Iinoya, Hamana Ward, Hamamatsu City, Shizuoka Prefecture, Japan * coordinates: {{Coord|34|49|58.55|N|137|39|49.28|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark}} == Deities Enshrined == * {{ill|Tamayorihime no Mikoto|ja|玉依姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamayorihime no Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to タマヨリビメ|1=Tamayori-hime|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q56344982}} * {{ill|Hondawake no Mikoto (Emperor Ojin)|ja|品陀和気命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hondawake no Mikoto (Emperor Ojin)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 応神天皇|1=Emperor Ōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q317997}} * {{ill|Okitsunagatarashihime no Mikoto (Empress Jingu)|ja|息長足姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okitsunagatarashihime no Mikoto (Empress Jingu)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 神功皇后|1=Empress Jingū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q232803}} == History == === Establishment === The exact date of establishment is unknown. The shrine is believed to have been founded as an extension of the {{ill|Tenpaku Iwakura Site|ja|天白磐座遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Iwakura Site|qq=}}, a ritual site located on the summit of Yakushi Mountain behind the shrine, where relics from the Kofun period were discovered during excavations. In the Kyoro era (1528-1532), the Hachiman Shrine near Ryotanji Temple was merged with Ii Shrine, or some believe that Ii Shrine itself was relocated during this time. === Historical Overview === The shrine is mentioned in the "Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku" (Records of the Three Reigns of Japan) from the Jogan era (866), where it received a Rank promotion from Shorokuijo to Jugoi-ge. In the "Engishiki" (927), it is listed as a "Shikinaisha" (officially registered shrine) under Inasa District, Tōtōmi Province. During the Edo period, the shrine held a land grant of 15 koku and was revered by the local ruling Kondo family of the Ii Valley. In 1714, Lord Ii Naooki of Hikone Domain visited the shrine. Post-Meiji Restoration, it was classified as a "Gosha" (village shrine) under the modern shrine Ranking system. === Shrine Rank === * Promoted to Jugoi-ge (Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade) in 866 (Jogan 8). == Shrine Grounds == * Main Hall (Honden) * Shrine Office * Auxiliary Shrines == Cultural Properties == === Shizuoka Prefecture Designated Cultural Property === * {{ill|Tenpaku Iwakura Site|ja|天白磐座遺跡|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpaku Iwakura Site|qq=}} (designated on March 17, 1992) == References == * On-site Information Board * "Meiji Shrine Records" (1912) * "Place Names of Shizuoka Prefecture" (2000), Heibonsha == External Links == * {{Commonscat-inline|Ii-jinja}} {{translated page|ja|渭伊神社|version=102047733|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{Commons category|Ii-jinja}} [[ja:渭伊神社]] {{wikidata link|Q87853305}} [[Category:Buildings and structures in Hamana Ward]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Shizuoka Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Hamana Ward]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tōtōmi Province]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Tōtōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shizuoka Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Junior Fifth Rank]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]]
